projects.title: Arbitrage Engine
projects.details: An autonomous execution framework designed to identify transient micro-inefficiencies across decentralized order books. Built because existing open-source alternatives lacked mathematical rigor.

projects.title: Network Topology Optimization
projects.details: Algorithmic reduction of routing overhead. Applied custom graph partitioning to reduce worst-case latency profiles.

experiences.details: Quantified structural inefficiencies within options books. Engineered hedging corrections using high-dimensional pricing matrices.

nestedProjects.title: Option Pricing Matrix Optimizer
nestedProjects.details: Accelerated calculation speeds of analytical pricing primitives via tailored SIMD vector maps.

experiences.details: Advised an early-stage B2B logistics enterprise on defensive capital allocations. Modeled variable operational cash-burn scenarios to ensure structural resilience.
Addressed discrete order arrival constraints using continuous-time Markov models. Structured analytical proofs.
